caption: Priya, Dev's soccer got moved to 5:30 today, same time as Maya's piano with Mrs. Kovacs
Ugh of course it did. I've got Maya, can you grab Dev?
Yeah I'm off at 4. ER was slammed this morning, need the fresh air anyway
Rough shift?
Two codes back to back. Houston drivers don't believe in seatbelts apparently
Jesus. You ok?
Yeah, just tired. Coffee and Dev's terrible car singing will fix me
Ha, see you at 5:30 then
Sunday biryani, mom's recipe, non-negotiable
Post-night-shift Whataburger run, no regrets
Jupiter and its moons through the NexStar 8SE tonight
Diwali diyas lit, house smells like ghee and joy
Dev scored twice at Briarwood pickup
Maya's Science Olympiad trifold — future scientist

tabla practice, teen taal finally clicking
